ddls:
CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module (e.g., mux2, comparator) */,
  "technology" TEXT /* Technology used for the module (e.g., sky90, tsmc28) */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the module in micrometers */,
  "target_frequency" INTEGER /* Target frequency for the module in MHz */,
  "delay" REAL /* Delay of the module in seconds */,
  "area" REAL /* Area occupied by the module in square micrometers */,
  "power" REAL /* Power consumption of the module in nanowatts */,
  "energy" REAL /* Dynamic energy of the module in nanojoules */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module's functionality */,
  "design_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity level of the module design */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the module was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the module was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_technology FOREIGN KEY ("technology") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "tech_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology (e.g., sky90, tsmc28) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "node_size" INTEGER /* Node size in nanometers */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage required by the technology in volts */,
  "leakage_power" REAL /* Leakage power in watts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the designer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the designer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the designer in the project */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_designers" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module designed */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer who worked on the module */,
  "contribution" REAL /* Percentage of contribution by the designer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id", "designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance test */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance test */,
  "frequency_tested" INTEGER /* Frequency at which the test was conducted */,
  "power_tested" REAL /* Power consumed during the test */,
  "energy_tested" REAL /* Dynamic energy recorded during the test */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the test in Celsius */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage applied during the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_performance_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the test result */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the performance test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test conducted (e.g., power, speed) */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value obtained from the test */,
  "pass_fail" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES module_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback entry */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module being tested */,
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tester who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the tester (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_feedback_tester_id FOREIGN KEY ("tester_id") REFERENCES testers ("tester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_feedback_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testers" (
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tester */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the tester */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the tester */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of expertise or specialization */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_modules" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module associated with the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the module in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module associated with the status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the module (e.g., designed, in testing, completed) */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "next_step" TEXT /* Next step in the design process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_status_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., designer, tester, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_revisions_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_tags_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module having the dependency */,
  "dependent_module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module it depends on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_dependencies_dependent_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_dependencies_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)
